properties.remark: AN EF0 TORNADO OCCURRED IN PRAGUE ON THE MORNING OF JANUARY 10 CAUSING DAMAGE ALONG A 1.3 MILE PATH THROUGH THE WEST AND NORTH SIDE OF PRAGUE.

A LARGE TORNADO DEVELOPED NORTHEAST OF SPRINGER AND MOVED EAST-NORTHEAST, LIKELY MOVING INTO MURRAY COUNTY NEAR DOUGHERTY. THE TORNADO LASTED UNTIL APPROXIMATELY 437 PM.

*** 1 FATAL *** A DAMAGING TORNADO MOVED THROUGH MADILL, DAMAGING NUMEROUS HOMES, BUSINESSES AND INDUSTRIAL BUILDINGS. THE TORNADO CONTINUED TO APPROXIMATELY 505 PM DISSIPATING EAST OF TOWN.
